name: rust-pdf/rustpdf
description: Idiomatic PHP binding for the rust-pdf core (generate, manipulate, sign and validate PDFs) via FFI.

rustpdf.note: The native libpdf_ffi is fetched per-platform from the GitHub Release on first use, or eagerly via `composer run install-lib` / `php vendor/rust-pdf/rustpdf/bin/rustpdf-install-lib`. Set RUSTPDF_LIB to use a locally built library, or RUSTPDF_NO_DOWNLOAD=1 to forbid the fetch.
